product.title: Gyproc Gypboard Plain Gypsum Board – 12.5 mm | 1219 × 1829 mm | Tapered Edge
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc Gypboard® Plain is a standard gypsum plasterboard designed for interior walls and ceilings where normal fire, structural, and acoustic performance is required. It features a high-quality aerated gypsum core firmly bonded to durable paper liners, ensuring strength, stability, and a smooth surface finish.

Product Overview

Gyproc Gypboard® Plain is a standard plasterboard suitable for a wide range of dry construction applications. It is manufactured with an aerated gypsum core that is firmly bonded to strong paper liners, providing consistent performance, dimensional stability, and ease of installation.

This board is ideal for internal partitions, wall linings, and ceiling systems where standard fire resistance and acoustic performance are specified.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Standard gypsum board for everyday interior applications
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting, wallpapering, and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Reliable fire and acoustic performance under normal conditions
  • Easy cutting, handling, and installation
  • Manufactured as per Indian and international standards

Recommended Applications

  • Internal partition walls
  • Wall linings in residential and commercial buildings
  • False ceilings and soffits
  • Offices, retail spaces, homes, and institutions
  • Areas where normal fire, structural, and acoustic performance is required

Not suitable for high-humidity or damp areas.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1219 mm
Length 1829 mm
Edge Type Tapered (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.16 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >180 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >500 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB01 – Gypboard® Plain

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1): 2011
  • EN 520: 2004

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface
  • Keep in a dry, covered area protected from weather
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures above 49°C
  • Ensure cross-ventilation during storage
  • Handle boards carefully to prevent edge damage

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB01 – Gypboard® Plain

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Not suitable for high-humidity or damp locations
  • Not recommended where condensation risk is high

For bathrooms, kitchens, or wet areas, use moisture-resistant gypsum boards.

What’s Included
  • 1 × Gyproc Gypboard® Plain Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1219 × 1829 mm)
product.productType: Hardware > Building Materials > Drywall
tags: Hardware > Building Materials > Drywall

product.title: Gyproc Moisture Resistant Gypsum Board 12.5mm | 1220×1830 mm | TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board is a specially engineered gypsum plasterboard designed for areas exposed to intermittent moisture. It features an aerated gypsum core with water-repellent additives, firmly bonded to durable paper liners, providing improved resistance to moisture while maintaining strength and surface quality.

Product Overview

Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board is designed for use in wet and moisture-prone interior areas. The board consists of a gypsum core enhanced with water-repellent additives and encased in strong paper liners, ensuring durability, dimensional stability, and controlled moisture absorption.

This board is ideal for internal partitions, wall linings, and ceilings in areas such as bathrooms and kitchens when used as part of a complete Gyproc system.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Moisture-resistant gypsum board with water-repellent additives
  • Reduced water absorption as per IS 2095 (Part 1): 2023 – Type H1
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Provides standard fire and acoustic performance
  • Easy cutting, handling, and installation

Recommended Applications

  • Bathrooms and wash areas (non-direct water exposure)
  • Kitchens and utility areas
  • Moisture-prone internal partition walls
  • Wall linings and ceilings in residential and commercial buildings

Suitable for wet area applications when used with appropriate waterproofing systems.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1220 mm
Length 1830 mm
Edge Type Tapered Edge (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.19 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Water Absorption (IS 2095 Part 1:2023) Type H1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >210 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >550 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB02 – Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Board

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1): 2023 – Type H1
  • EN 520: 2004 – Type A & H1

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface in a covered, dry area
  • Protect from direct exposure to weather and moisture
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures exceeding 49°C
  • Ensure cross-ventilation in storage areas
  • Handle carefully to prevent edge and surface damage

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Not suitable for areas with continuous water contact
  • Not recommended where humidity or dampness is constantly high
  • Condensation may cause mould growth if not addressed at design stage

For areas with direct water exposure, use additional waterproofing systems or specialised boards.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Gyproc® Moisture Resistant Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1220 × 1830 mm)
product.productType: Hardware > Building Materials > Drywall
tags: Hardware > Building Materials > Drywall

product.title: Gyproc Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board 12.5mm | 1220×1830 mm | TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Board is a specially formulated gypsum plasterboard designed to provide enhanced fire resistance for interior wall and ceiling systems. It features a glass fibre reinforced gypsum core bonded to high-quality paper liners, ensuring improved fire performance while maintaining strength and surface finish.

Product Overview

Gyproc® Fireline Board is engineered for applications where increased fire protection is required. The board incorporates glass fibres within the gypsum core, which help maintain structural integrity for a longer period during fire exposure.

This board is suitable for use in partitions, wall linings, and ceiling systems in residential, commercial, and institutional buildings as part of a tested Gyproc drywall system.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Fire-resistant gypsum board with glass fibre reinforcement
  • Enhanced fire protection for critical interior applications
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Provides standard acoustic performance
  • Easy to cut, handle, and install

Recommended Applications

  • Fire-rated internal partition walls
  • Fire-resistant wall linings
  • Ceiling systems requiring enhanced fire performance
  • Commercial buildings, offices, hospitals, and institutions
  • Residential projects with fire safety requirements

Fire performance depends on complete system design and installation.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1220 mm
Length 1830 mm
Edge Type Tapered Edge (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.25 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >210 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >550 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB03 – Gyproc® Fireline Board

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1) – Type F
  • EN 520: 2004 – Type DF

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface
  • Keep in a dry, covered area protected from weather
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures above 49°C
  • Ensure adequate ventilation during storage
  • Handle carefully to prevent damage to edges and surface

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Fire resistance depends on the complete system configuration
  • Not suitable for high-humidity or wet areas
  • Improper installation may reduce fire performance

For moisture-prone areas, use moisture-resistant or specialised boards in combination with fire-rated systems.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1220 × 1830 mm)

product.descriptionHtml:

product.title: Tarkett Welding Rod – Vinyl Flooring Seam Welding Solution
product.descriptionHtml:
Tarkett Welding Rod is a high-performance seam welding solution designed for homogeneous vinyl flooring installations. It ensures durable, hygienic, and visually seamless floor joints in demanding commercial environments.

Product Overview

Tarkett welding rods are engineered to create strong, permanent joints between vinyl flooring sheets. When heat-welded into grooved seams, the rod fuses with the flooring material, enhancing structural integrity and preventing moisture ingress.

Ideal for healthcare, education, retail, and commercial spaces, welding rods play a critical role in maintaining hygiene and long-term floor performance.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Designed for homogeneous vinyl flooring systems
  • Creates strong, watertight floor seams
  • Enhances hygiene by sealing joints
  • Colour-coordinated options (as per flooring collection)
  • Durable and wear-resistant performance

Recommended Applications

  • Hospitals & Healthcare Facilities
  • Educational Institutions
  • Retail & Commercial Spaces
  • Laboratories & Clean Rooms
  • High-Traffic Public Areas

Installation Guidelines

Welding rods are installed after adhesive curing by grooving floor seams and applying controlled heat welding. Proper installation should be carried out by trained flooring professionals following manufacturer guidelines.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Details
Product Type Vinyl Seam Welding Rod
Material Compatibility Homogeneous Vinyl Flooring
Application Method Heat Welding
Usage Area Commercial & Institutional Flooring

Brand Assurance

This product is supplied in association with Tarkett flooring systems. Warranty and performance are subject to manufacturer guidelines and installation standards.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Tarkett Welding Rod (Colour Variant as Selected)

product.title: USGKnauf Fiber Tape 50mm*90m RL
product.descriptionHtml:
USGKnauf Fiber Tape 50mm*90m RL

The USGKnauf Fiber Tape 50mm*90m RL is a high-strength fiberglass mesh tape designed for drywall and plasterboard joint reinforcement. It provides superior crack resistance and ensures durable, professional-quality wall and ceiling finishes.

Key Features:

  • Size: 50mm width, 90m roll – ideal for standard and large drywall joints.
  • Material: Durable fiberglass mesh for superior strength and flexibility.
  • Application: Perfect for embedding in joint compound on drywall and plasterboard seams and corners.
  • Compatibility: Works with USGKnauf jointing compounds, ready-mix plasters, and gypsum boards.
  • Durability: Resists cracking, shrinking, and tearing over time.

Benefits:

  • Prevents cracks in drywall joints and corners effectively.
  • Easy to apply with jointing compound for smooth finishing.
  • Professional-grade reinforcement ensures long-lasting results.
  • Suitable for residential and commercial wall and ceiling projects.

Usage Instructions:

Apply a thin layer of joint compound along the seam. Embed the fiberglass mesh tape into the compound, then cover with a finishing layer. Smooth using a drywall knife or trowel. Allow to dry before sanding and painting.

Perfect For:

Drywall and plasterboard joint reinforcement, interior wall and ceiling finishing, commercial and residential construction projects, and professional contractors needing crack-resistant solutions.

product.title: Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board 12.5mm | 1220×1830 mm | TE
product.descriptionHtml:
Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Board is a specially formulated gypsum plasterboard designed to provide enhanced fire resistance for interior wall and ceiling systems. It features a glass fibre reinforced gypsum core bonded to high-quality paper liners, ensuring improved fire performance while maintaining strength and surface finish.

Product Overview

Gyproc® Fireline Board is engineered for applications where increased fire protection is required. The board incorporates glass fibres within the gypsum core, which help maintain structural integrity for a longer period during fire exposure.

This board is suitable for use in partitions, wall linings, and ceiling systems in residential, commercial, and institutional buildings as part of a tested Gyproc drywall system.

Key Features & Benefits

  • Fire-resistant gypsum board with glass fibre reinforcement
  • Enhanced fire protection for critical interior applications
  • Smooth surface suitable for painting and decorative finishes
  • Compatible with metal framing and drywall systems
  • Provides standard acoustic performance
  • Easy to cut, handle, and install

Recommended Applications

  • Fire-rated internal partition walls
  • Fire-resistant wall linings
  • Ceiling systems requiring enhanced fire performance
  • Commercial buildings, offices, hospitals, and institutions
  • Residential projects with fire safety requirements

Fire performance depends on complete system design and installation.

Technical Specifications

Parameter Value
Thickness 12.5 mm
Width 1220 mm
Length 1830 mm
Edge Type Tapered Edge (Longitudinal)
Thermal Conductivity (k) 0.25 W/m·K
Ignitability (BS 476 – Part 5) Class P
Surface Spread of Flame (BS 476 – Part 7) Class 1
Flexural Strength – Transverse >210 N
Flexural Strength – Longitudinal >550 N

Product Data Sheet Reference: PB03 – Gyproc® Fireline Board

Standards & Compliance

  • IS 2095 (Part 1) – Type F
  • EN 520: 2004 – Type DF

Handling & Storage Guidelines

  • Store boards flat on a level surface
  • Keep in a dry, covered area protected from weather
  • Avoid exposure to temperatures above 49°C
  • Ensure adequate ventilation during storage
  • Handle carefully to prevent damage to edges and surface

Limitations & Important Notes

  • Fire resistance depends on the complete system configuration
  • Not suitable for high-humidity or wet areas
  • Improper installation may reduce fire performance

For moisture-prone areas, use moisture-resistant or specialised boards in combination with fire-rated systems.

What’s Included

  • 1 × Gyproc® Fireline Fire Resistant Gypsum Board (12.5 × 1220 × 1830 mm)

product.title: HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm Acoustic Ceiling Tile & Wall Panel – High Sound Absorption | Knauf
product.descriptionHtml:
HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm – Premium Acoustic Ceiling & Wall Panel

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm is a high-performance acoustic ceiling tile and wall panel designed to deliver superior sound absorption, fire safety, and design flexibility. Manufactured using magnesite bonded wood wool, this single-layer panel combines durability, sustainability, and refined aesthetics for modern architectural applications.

Acoustic Performance

With a finely textured surface featuring 2 mm fibre width and an integrated acoustic fleece backing, this panel provides excellent sound absorption, making it suitable for environments where noise control and speech clarity are essential.

  • High sound absorption coefficient (αw up to 0.75)
  • Reduces echo and improves acoustic comfort
  • Ideal for large and high-occupancy spaces

Fire Safety

The panel is classified with A2 fire reaction performance, ensuring excellent resistance to fire and compliance with modern building safety standards.

  • Non-combustible classification
  • Suitable for commercial and public buildings
  • Enhances overall safety of interiors

Durability and Impact Resistance

HERADESIGN® panels offer strong structural integrity and excellent resistance to impact, making them suitable for demanding environments such as educational institutions and sports facilities.

Design and Aesthetic Flexibility

The fine surface texture combined with a wide range of colour options allows architects and designers to create distinctive and visually appealing interiors. The availability of 14 edge detail options further enhances installation versatility.

  • Fine texture for modern interiors
  • Multiple colour customization options
  • Suitable for ceilings and wall applications

Sustainability

This product is manufactured using PEFC and FSC-certified wood and is supported by an Environmental Product Declaration (EPD), making it a responsible choice for sustainable construction projects.

  • Certified sustainable raw materials
  • Environmentally responsible production
  • Supports green building initiatives

Applications

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm is suitable for a wide range of interior environments including:

  • Offices and corporate spaces
  • Educational institutions and classrooms
  • Retail environments and shopping areas
  • Hospitality spaces such as hotels and restaurants
  • Sports halls and multi-purpose areas

Technical Specifications

  • Product Type: Wood Wool Acoustic Panel
  • Thickness: 25 mm
  • Dimensions: 1200 mm x 600 mm
  • Fibre Width: 2 mm
  • Sound Absorption (αw): Up to 0.75
  • Fire Rating: A2
  • Colour: White (custom options available)
  • Edge Details: 14 variants

Product Details

  • Product Code: 00774782
  • EAN: 9002825214076
  • Edge Type: AK-01
  • Coverage Area: 0.76 m²

Why Choose HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm offers a balanced combination of acoustic efficiency, fire safety, durability, and sustainable design. It is an ideal solution for modern construction projects that demand both performance and aesthetic quality.

product.title: AMF THERMATEX Feinstratos Micro Complete 15mm Ceiling Tile | NRC 0.70 Acoustic Panel
product.descriptionHtml:
AMF THERMATEX® Feinstratos Micro Complete 15mm Ceiling Tile

The AMF THERMATEX® Feinstratos Micro Complete 15mm Ceiling Tile is a premium mineral acoustic ceiling solution engineered for balanced sound absorption, sound attenuation, and indoor air quality. Featuring a microperforated, finely sanded surface, it delivers consistent acoustic performance with a clean and modern appearance.

With NRC 0.70 sound absorption and 34 dB sound attenuation, this ceiling tile is ideal for spaces requiring both noise control and sound insulation between rooms.

Key Features

  • Balanced Acoustic Performance: NRC 0.70 and attenuation up to 34 dB
  • Microperforated Surface: Enhances sound absorption and aesthetics
  • Excellent Fire Safety: Class A2-s1, d0
  • High Light Reflectance: 85% for brighter interiors
  • Indoor Air Quality Certified: Indoor Air Comfort® Gold
  • Sustainable Construction: EPD certified, bio-soluble mineral wool

Technical Specifications

  • Material: Mineral wool ceiling tile
  • Thickness: 15 mm
  • NRC: 0.70
  • Sound Attenuation: 34 dB
  • Light Reflectance: 85%
  • Surface: Microperforated finely sanded finish
  • Fire Rating: A2-s1, d0

Available Size

  • 600 x 600 x 15 mm

Edge Options

  • Board Edge
  • Tegular 24 Edge
  • Tegular 15 Edge

Applications

  • Offices & Corporate Spaces
  • Retail Environments
  • Production & Industrial Areas

Why Choose AMF THERMATEX Feinstratos Micro Complete?

  • Provides both sound absorption and sound insulation
  • Improves indoor air quality with certified materials
  • Ensures fire safety and compliance with European standards

product.title: HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm Acoustic Ceiling Tile & Wall Panel – High Sound Absorption | Knauf
product.descriptionHtml:
HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm – Premium Acoustic Ceiling & Wall Panel

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm is a high-performance acoustic ceiling tile and wall panel designed to deliver superior sound absorption, fire safety, and design flexibility. Manufactured using magnesite bonded wood wool, this single-layer panel combines durability, sustainability, and refined aesthetics for modern architectural applications.

Acoustic Performance

With a finely textured surface featuring 2 mm fibre width and an integrated acoustic fleece backing, this panel provides excellent sound absorption, making it suitable for environments where noise control and speech clarity are essential.

  • High sound absorption coefficient (αw up to 0.75)
  • Reduces echo and improves acoustic comfort
  • Ideal for large and high-occupancy spaces

Fire Safety

The panel is classified with A2 fire reaction performance, ensuring excellent resistance to fire and compliance with modern building safety standards.

  • Non-combustible classification
  • Suitable for commercial and public buildings
  • Enhances overall safety of interiors

Durability and Impact Resistance

HERADESIGN® panels offer strong structural integrity and excellent resistance to impact, making them suitable for demanding environments such as educational institutions and sports facilities.

Design and Aesthetic Flexibility

The fine surface texture combined with a wide range of colour options allows architects and designers to create distinctive and visually appealing interiors. The availability of 14 edge detail options further enhances installation versatility.

  • Fine texture for modern interiors
  • Multiple colour customization options
  • Suitable for ceilings and wall applications

Sustainability

This product is manufactured using PEFC and FSC-certified wood and is supported by an Environmental Product Declaration (EPD), making it a responsible choice for sustainable construction projects.

  • Certified sustainable raw materials
  • Environmentally responsible production
  • Supports green building initiatives

Applications

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm is suitable for a wide range of interior environments including:

  • Offices and corporate spaces
  • Educational institutions and classrooms
  • Retail environments and shopping areas
  • Hospitality spaces such as hotels and restaurants
  • Sports halls and multi-purpose areas

Technical Specifications

  • Product Type: Wood Wool Acoustic Panel
  • Thickness: 25 mm
  • Dimensions: 1200 mm x 600 mm
  • Fibre Width: 2 mm
  • Sound Absorption (αw): Up to 0.75
  • Fire Rating: A2
  • Colour: White (custom options available)
  • Edge Details: 14 variants

Product Details

  • Product Code: 00774782
  • EAN: 9002825214076
  • Edge Type: AK-01
  • Coverage Area: 0.76 m²

Why Choose HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+

HERADESIGN® Fine A2 Alpha+ 25mm offers a balanced combination of acoustic efficiency, fire safety, durability, and sustainable design. It is an ideal solution for modern construction projects that demand both performance and aesthetic quality.
